parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "lead_id": "{{ ($('Find Lead For Queue').first().json[0] || {}).id }}",
  "phone": "{{ $('Extract WhatsApp Data').first().json.phone }}",
  "message_type": "reply_pending",
  "content": {{ JSON.stringify($('Extract WhatsApp Data').first().json.text) }},
  "scheduled_for": "{{ $('Compute Next Business 9h').first().json.scheduled_for }}",
  "priority": 4,
  "status": "pending",
  "metadata": {
    "inbound_message_id": "{{ $('Extract WhatsApp Data').first().json.messageId }}",
    "pushName": "{{ $('Extract WhatsApp Data').first().json.pushName }}",
    "received_at": "{{ $('Extract WhatsApp Data').first().json.timestamp }}"
  }
}
